entry.message: Community agent run with posting enabled

window.operatingHours: Agent checks 10:00-19:00 America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires; War Room opens weekdays after 11:15 AM ARG; closed Saturdays and Sundays

items.message:
Hey team! 👋

Today's [**Stargazer Axiom daily thread**](https://community.outlier.ai/t/daily-thread-07-09/2903272) is up.

Please take a few minutes to read it before tasking today. The topic is **Test Quality**, with a reminder about **Tests must pass for ANY valid solution, not just yours.**.

Quick rule: If the method name isn't in the prompt, don't call it in a test.



Use the daily thread for blockers, Cursor issues, validation/eval problems, onboarding questions, or task-related doubts 🙌
items.ignoredReason: Manager announcement authored by the configured bot user, not a contributor support request.
